_note: Historical validation record from pre-release acceptance review. This package is now the sole public mainline.

acceptable_if: no core arbiter misordering between task, wake seed, proactive, rhythm, and cron
closure and writeback boundaries still hold
validation does not leave state pollution behind
remaining issues are patch-level rather than redesign-level
not_acceptable_if: task or progress hooks lose to generic proactive follow-up
sleep, work-dnd, and wake phases fight each other
the implementation still needs a major path rewrite

followup_harness_20260427_061117.notes: Includes same-day wake handoff guard in the time_sense case.
